sentences.english: I binge-watched an entire series in one weekend.
I try to limit myself to two episodes per night, but the cliffhangers always get me.
sentences.korean: 밤에 2편으로 제한하려 하지만 다음 회 예고가 항상 나를 잡아요.

sentences.english: I never binge-watch because I like to think about each episode before watching the next one, it's more enjoyable that way.
sentences.korean: 몰아보기를 안 해요. 다음 편 보기 전에 각 에피소드를 생각해보는 게 좋아서요. 그 편이 더 즐거워요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
